ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song (0-100) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the song in milliseconds */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in beats per minute */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song (0-11, where 0=C, 1=C#, 2=D, etc.) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song (e.g., 4 for 4/4 time) */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood tag assigned by users (e.g., Happy, Sad, Energetic) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the lyrics of the song */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the song */,
  "region_restriction" TEXT /* Countries or regions where the song is restricted */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the song */,
  "album_track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_mood FOREIGN KEY ("mood") REFERENCES moods ("mood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art image */,
  "label" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the album */,
  "region_restriction" TEXT /* Countries or regions where the album is restricted */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "label" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the artist */,
  "region_restriction" TEXT /* Countries or regions where the artist's content is restricted */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the artist */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "influences" TEXT /* JSON array of influences */,
  "awards" TEXT /* JSON array of awards and recognitions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mood */,
  "mood_name" TEXT /* Name of the mood (e.g., Happy, Sad, Energetic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mood */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mood was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the mood was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who added the favorite */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song added to favorites (optional) */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist added to favorites (optional) */,
  "favorite_type" TEXT /* Type of favorite (song or artist) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the favorite was added */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the favorite is public or private */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes or comments about the favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the playlist */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* JSON array of image URLs for the playlist */,
  "privacy_level" TEXT /* Privacy level of the playlist (e.g., public, private, unlisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song entry */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song added to the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song involved in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity (e.g., play duration in milliseconds) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the activity (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Pop, Rock, Indie) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the genre was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the genre was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song (optional) */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album (optional) */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist (optional) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., review, suggestion, complaint) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is public or private */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
